title: Finance Manager
description:
About the job

Rently is looking for a Finance Manager to own the financial core of the business.

We operate a fintech and lending business across Singapore and Dubai. As we scale, the financial complexity of the business is increasing, and we’re investing in stronger planning, visibility, and decision support. We’re looking for someone who deeply understands how money flows through the business and can help leadership make better decisions, faster.

This is our first dedicated finance hire and a critical role at Rently. You will sit at the center of planning, performance tracking, and decision support. Your primary focus will be FP&A, financial modelling, unit economics, and cash visibility.

You’ll work directly with the CEO and closely with the leadership team. You’ll be supported by internal accountants who handle day-to-day bookkeeping and a fractional CFO who acts as a senior advisor. Your role sits in between: hands-on, analytical, and close to the business.

If you like building clarity from messy inputs and want real ownership in an early-stage fintech, this role is for you.

What You’ll Do

Primary Responsibilities (Day-to-day, must be excellent)

📐 Financial Modelling & Forecasting

  • Build, own and maintain Rently’s core financial model used for planning, fundraising, and decision-making
  • Own rolling forecasts, key assumptions, debt investor reporting and scenario analysis
  • Update projections as the business evolves and flag issues early

📊 Unit Economics & Portfolio Analytics

  • Own unit economics across products and markets
  • Track yields, defaults, provisioning, contribution margins, cohort performance, PAR30, write-offs, and IRR
  • Help leadership understand what is working, what is not, and why

💸 Burn, Runway & Cash Visibility

  • Maintain a clear, up-to-date view of burn, runway, and short-term liquidity
  • Support the CEO on capital deployment decisions and pacing of growth

🤝 Leadership Decision Support

  • Partner with the CEO/Founders and leadership team on pricing, hiring pace, market expansion, and growth vs. profitability trade-offs
  • Prepare clear, concise materials for leadership, board, and investor discussions
  • Secondary Responsibilities (Support / Coordination)

🧾 Accounting & Data Reliability

  • Partner closely with internal and external accountants to ensure clean, timely, and reliable financial data
  • You won’t do day-to-day bookkeeping, but you are accountable for having accurate numbers to drive analysis and planning

📜 Regulatory, Investor & Debt Reporting (Numbers-focused)

  • Support regulatory and compliance reporting in Singapore and the UAE by owning financial inputs (not filings)
  • Support debt investor reporting using existing templates and guidance
  • Provide financial inputs for audits, tax, and licensing processes

🌍 Multi-Market Financial View

  • Consolidate Singapore and Dubai into a single financial view
  • Oversee FX exposure, intercompany considerations, and market-level P&Ls (oversight, not structuring)

📊 Financial Data & Analysis

  • Pull and analyze data directly where possible (without relying heavily on engineering)
  • Build dashboards or analyses to track performance, defaults, and unit economics using available tools

Who You Are

✅ FP&A-first, Hands-on Finance Operator

  • ~7–10 years of experience in finance, FP&A, or related roles
  • Strong financial modelling and forecasting skills
  • Comfortable getting into the details and building models yourself

✅ Strong Foundation in Accounting

  • Background in audit or accounting (Big 4 or in-house) strongly preferred

You understand how financial statements are built and how to pressure-test numbers

✅ Experience with Capital-Intensive or Lending Models

  • Experience in fintech, lending, BNPL, or other capital-intensive businesses is a strong plus
  • Comfortable working with loan books, portfolios, or cohort-based economics

✅ Clear Thinker & Communicator

  • Able to explain numbers clearly to non-finance teammates
  • Focused on what matters, not just what is technically correct

✅ Independent & Practical

  • Comfortable with ambiguity and imperfect systems
  • Able to create structure, prioritize, and move without heavy direction

⭐ Bonus:

  • Experience at an early-stage or high-growth startup
  • Comfortable pulling data using SQL
  • Experience with BI or analytics tools (Looker, Metabase, Tableau, Power BI)
  • Experience working across multiple markets or entities

Tools & System

  • Strong Excel / Google Sheets modelling skills required
  • Experience with accounting systems such as Xero (or similar) preferred
  • Comfortable working with raw data exports and financial systems

Growth Path

  • This is a foundational finance hire. As Rently scales, this role has clear upside:
  • Opportunity to grow into a Head of Finance role over time
  • Opportunity to build and manage a small finance team
  • Increasing influence over business strategy, capital planning, and investor relationships

Why Join Rently

🏙️ Build a meaningful fintech business – Help shape the future of renting and payments across multiple markets.

🤝 Work closely with leadership – Partner directly with the CEO on the most important decisions in the business.

📈 Real ownership – This is a foundational hire with real responsibility and impact.

🌍 Flexibility & growth – Hybrid setup in Singapore with exposure to regional expansion as we scale.

📢 Note: Direct applicants only — we’re not working with agencies for this role.

postedCompany.description:
Rently represents the evolution of rental property management, empowering landlords and real estate sales professionals to better manage their rental properties while efficiently handling tenant queries and requests. Through real-time data insights and unrivalled technology, Rently is committed to driving efficiency and convenience and establishing trust within the rental property ecosystem.

Rently enables end-to-end support for the property rental process, from property listing and tenant acquisition, to contract negotiation, signing and managing tenancy support requests. Operational processes can now be completed faster and more economically. Through integration with national digital IDs like SingPass, Rently is able to ensure convenient and secure rental transactions.
postedCompany.name: RENTLY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
